description: CompositionBlack and blue striped sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a cowl neck with drawstrings, long sleeves, flat knitted cuffs and hem, one hand warmer pouch on the front with two asymmetric openings and branding embroidered above the left hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsGet stylish with this fabulous sweatshirt from wrangler. The long sleeves keeps you cosy, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
